title: icacorea lasseri
intro: Icacorea lasseri is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae, native to tropical regions. It is a woody climber with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which may include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, as well as its ability to aid in the treatment of wounds and skin conditions. Icacorea lasseri is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
